title: Monster Truck Fire
lesson: Rev up! These sentences keep getting longer. You can handle it — read strong!
sentences: The bird is in the nest.
The dog can run with you.
We can shop and get gum.
The kid will swat a bug.
The camp is near the pond.
The kid can spot the fox.
The bug is under the rug.
We can rest in the tent.
The duck went to the pond.
The bird is on the perch.
She can swim to the dock.
He lost his hat at park.
We sang a song at camp.
The frog hid in the mud.
She got the best test yet.
